user_query: fix ai-pcli regex to correctly extract directory paths without extensions for context auto-detection
ast_summary: ai_cli.py _extract_file_paths_from_query uses abs_path_pattern requiring file extension

critic_findings.description: abs_path_pattern requires file extension suffix so directory paths like P:/packages/yt-is are not matched
critic_findings.suggestion: Add directory-path pattern matching absolute paths without extensions but that exist as directories on disk

claim_verification.claim: _extract_file_paths_from_query regex at line 2181 requires file extension suffix
claim_verification.evidence: abs_path_pattern uses dot wildcard quantifier for extension matching

claim_verification.claim: Query review P:/packages/yt-is produces empty path matches due to missing extension
claim_verification.evidence: yt-is has no file extension so it does not match the abs_path_pattern

claim_verification.claim: Extensionless absolute paths that are directories should be matched for context
claim_verification.evidence: P:/packages/yt-is exists as a directory and is a valid context target for review

claim_verification.claim: Fallback git status runs against P: root causing wrong context
claim_verification.evidence: git status from P: shows Stop.py as recently modified, wrong target repo

adr_markdown:
ADR: Fix Context Auto-Detection for Extensionless Directory Paths

## Status
Accepted

## Context

When /ai-pcli is invoked with a directory path that has no file extension, the context auto-detection fails because the path extraction regex requires a file extension suffix.


## Decision

Enhance _extract_file_paths_from_query to match absolute directory paths without extensions by adding a Pattern 3 that extracts extensionless absolute paths and filters by directory existence.

## Consequences

- Directory paths like P:/packages/yt-is will be correctly extracted and used as context
- Backward compatible with existing file-extension patterns
- No performance impact
